identity: Human MAN (male, distinctly masculine, broad shoulders, flat chest, square jaw, NO feminine curves), about 28 years old, shoulder-length wavy auburn hair, gray-blue eyes, calm focused face, clean-shaven.
outfit: Simple forest-green short-sleeved tunic laced at the chest, brown leather bracers, brown leather quiver strap crossing the chest, dark green trousers, brown boots.
weapons: A wooden recurve longbow carried in the left hand or over the left shoulder. A brown quiver of arrows on the back over the right shoulder, fletchings visible.
attackStyle: East-facing. Bow drawn full, right hand at cheek, arrow nocked, left arm extended forward holding the bow, focused aim.
spellStyle: East-facing. Left hand raised with a glowing green leaf rune, bow lowered at his side, serene expression.
blockStyle: East-facing. Bow held horizontally across the chest in both hands as a guard, knees bent.
koStyle: East-facing, on one knee, bow fallen beside him, head bowed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Bow gripped in the left hand at his side, right hand resting near quiver strap.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Shoulder-length wavy auburn hair, green tunic, brown leather quiver strap across the chest, wooden longbow over left shoulder, MALE adult face with strong jaw and flat chest (distinctly masculine, no feminine features).

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human MAN (male, distinctly masculine, broad shoulders, flat chest, square jaw, NO feminine curves), about 28 years old, shoulder-length wavy auburn hair, gray-blue eyes, calm focused face, clean-shaven.

OUTFIT: Simple forest-green short-sleeved tunic laced at the chest, brown leather bracers, brown leather quiver strap crossing the chest, dark green trousers, brown boots.

WEAPONS: A wooden recurve longbow carried in the left hand or over the left shoulder. A brown quiver of arrows on the back over the right shoulder, fletchings visible.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

AGE & PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): character is a fully-grown adult about 28-32 years old with standard heroic adult proportions (approximately 6 feet / 180 cm tall). NOT a child, NOT a teenager, NOT elderly, NOT a graybeard wizard.

SCALE (non-negotiable): full-body figure occupies approximately 85% of the 256x256 canvas height, feet near the bottom edge, head near the top — consistent scale with other adult humanoid characters in the same sprite set.

LIGHTING (non-negotiable): bright evenly-lit pixel art, NOT silhouetted, NOT overly dark, NOT cast in deep shadow. All colors, facial features, and outfit details must be fully readable.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.
